categories.name: Tooling
categories.description: Repositories that provide tools or utilities for software development, such as IDEs, build tools, or developer workflows.

categories.name: Systems
categories.description: Repositories focused on operating systems, system-level software, or infrastructure components like kernels or core system services.

categories.name: Frameworks
categories.description: Repositories that offer foundational software frameworks, libraries, or platforms for building applications in specific domains.

categories.name: Other
categories.description: Repositories that do not clearly fit into the above categories based on content and domain.
